VDD -VSS.conditions: External main supply voltage (including VDDA and VDD)

VIN.parameter: Input voltage on five volt tolerant pin

VIN_VSS__0_3_to_4_0.parameter: Input voltage on any other pin

|ΔVDDx|.parameter: Variations between different VDD power pins

|VSSx -VSS|.parameter: Variations between all the different ground pins

IVDD.parameter: Total current into VDD/VDDA power lines (source)

IVSS.parameter: Total current out of VSS ground lines (sink)

IIO.parameter: Output current sunk by any I/O and control pin

IIO__2.parameter: Output current source by any I/Os and control pin

VDDA.conditions: Must be the same potential as VDD

VDDA_Must_be_the_same_potential_as.conditions: Must be the same potential as VDD

IDD.conditions: External clock, all peripherals enabled, fHCLK = 72 MHz

IDD_External_clock__all_peripheral__2.conditions: External clock, all peripherals disabled, fHCLK = 72 MHz

IDD_External_clock__all_peripheral__3.conditions: External clock, all peripherals disabled, fHCLK = 72 MHz

IDD_Regulator_in_Run_mode__VDD___3.conditions: Regulator in Run mode, VDD = 3.3 V

IDD_LSI_and_IWDG_OFF__VDD___3_3_V.conditions: LSI and IWDG OFF, VDD = 3.3 V

IDD_VBAT.conditions: Low-speed oscillator and RTC ON, VBAT = 3.3 V

IDD_VBAT_Low_speed_oscillator_and_RTC_O.conditions: Low-speed oscillator and RTC ON, VBAT = 3.3 V

VOL.conditions: CMOS port, IIO = +8 mA, 2.7 V < VDD < 3.6 V

VOH.conditions: TTL port, IIO = +8 mA, 2.7 V < VDD < 3.6 V
